product_overview: Retro Tool is a web-based real-time retrospective application using the Mad/Sad/Glad format and Socket.IO for live collaboration. It enables quick room creation, entry drafting/publishing, timer-based retros, rating, and export functionality.
core_goals: Allow teams to create and join real-time retrospective rooms with a short 6-digit code and invite link.
Support draft/publish workflow for Mad/Sad/Glad entries with real-time updates via WebSockets.
Provide creator controls for managing timer, lifecycle (reopen/terminate), entry selection and export.
Enable post-retro rating of published entries and export selected published entries to Excel.
Support multiple languages (TR/EN/DE/ES) with client-side persistence.

features.name: Home Page Navigation
features.description: Landing page where users can enter a room code to join, navigate to create a room, or use keyboard shortcuts to create rooms.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Enter 6-digit room code in input field -> Click join button to join a room -> Navigate to /join/:code
Navigate to / -> Click create room link to navigate to /create-room -> See create room form
Navigate to / -> Press Ctrl+N -> Navigate to /create-room
Navigate to / -> Enter invalid room code (not 6 digits) in input field -> Click join button to join a room -> See validation error message about room code

features.name: Create Room
features.description: Create a new retrospective room with a name, optional participant limit and optional time limit; receive room code and invite link on success.
user_flows: Navigate to /create-room -> Enter room name (2-50 characters) -> Optionally set participant limit (1-50) -> Optionally set time limit in minutes (1-300) or Click time limit preset button (15/30/45/60 min) -> Click create room button -> See success modal with room code and invite link -> Click copy invite link button -> Click go to room button -> Navigate to /room/:code
Navigate to /create-room -> Enter room name shorter than 2 characters -> Click create room button -> See validation error about room name length
Navigate to /create-room -> Enter participant limit greater than 50 -> Click create room button -> See validation error about participant limit
Navigate to /create-room -> Click create room button but server returns error -> See error modal with retry option

features.name: Join Room
features.description: Join an existing room using the 6-digit code from an invite link and a username that follows validation rules.
user_flows: Navigate to /join/:code -> Enter username (2-20 characters, alphanumeric + Turkish chars) -> Click join button -> POST /api/join-room -> On success navigate to /room/:code
Navigate to /join/:code -> Enter username that is already taken in the room -> Click join button -> See error indicating username is taken
Navigate to /join/:code -> Enter username when room participant limit reached -> Click join button -> See error indicating room is full
Navigate to /join/:code -> Enter invalid username (too short or invalid chars) -> Click join button -> See validation error for username

features.name: Retrospective Board
features.description: Main Mad/Sad/Glad board where participants create draft entries, edit/delete drafts, publish to make them visible to others, and see real-time updates from other participants.
user_flows: Navigate to /room/:code -> See Mad/Sad/Glad board and character counters -> Focus Mad textarea (Ctrl+1) -> Type entry text in Mad textarea (<=500 chars) -> Click add button to create draft entry -> See draft entry in own list
Navigate to /room/:code -> Create draft entry -> Click publish button on own draft -> POST /api/room/:code/entry/:id/publish -> See entry become visible to other participants in real-time
Navigate to /room/:code -> Create draft entry -> Click edit button on own draft -> Change text within 500 chars -> Click save -> PUT /api/room/:code/entry/:id -> See updated draft text
Navigate to /room/:code -> Type entry text longer than 500 chars -> Click add button -> See character limit warning and prevent entry creation
Navigate to /room/:code after retro ended -> Attempt to add entry -> See error indicating retro has ended and entries cannot be created

features.name: Creator Room Controls
features.description: Controls available to the room creator: start/extend timer, reopen/terminate retro, select entries, and export selected published entries to Excel.
user_flows: Navigate to /room/:code as creator -> Click start timer button -> POST /api/room/:code/start -> See countdown timer start for all participants via real-time event
Navigate to /room/:code as creator -> Click extend time button -> Enter minutes (1-60) -> Click confirm -> POST /api/room/:code/extend-time -> See timer extended for all participants
Navigate to /room/:code as creator -> Click reopen room button -> POST /api/room/:code/reopen -> See room reopened and time limit removed

Navigate to /room/:code as creator -> Check entry checkboxes to select published entries -> Click download Excel button -> GET /api/room/:code/export -> Receive Excel (.xlsx) file with selected published entries
Navigate to /room/:code as non-creator -> Click start timer button -> See button disabled or hidden -> See permission error if attempt triggers API call
Navigate to /room/:code as creator -> Click extend time and enter value greater than 60 -> Click confirm -> See validation error about extension limit
Navigate to /room/:code as creator -> Click download Excel with no published entries selected -> See warning message to select published entries before export

features.name: Entry Rating
features.description: After a retro ends, participants can rate other users' published entries with 1-5 stars and see average ratings (creator view shows averages).
user_flows: Navigate to /room/:code after retro ended -> See published entries with rating stars -> Click a star (1-5) on another user's published entry -> POST /api/room/:code/entry/:id/rate -> See rating saved and average updated
Navigate to /room/:code after retro ended -> Try to rate own published entry -> Click stars on own entry -> See disabled controls or error preventing self-rating
Navigate to /room/:code before retro ended -> Attempt to click rating stars -> See message indicating rating is unavailable until retro ends

features.name: Language Switching
features.description: Switch UI language among Turkish, English, German, and Spanish; selection updates page text and persists in localStorage.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click language dropdown selector -> Select English -> See all page texts update to English immediately
Navigate to /create-room -> Change language to German from dropdown -> See labels and buttons update to German -> Reload page -> See selected language persisted via localStorage
Navigate to / -> Select unsupported language code (or missing translation file) -> See UI fallback to default language (Turkish) and a console/network error logged

routes.description: Home page with room code join form
Join an existing room by entering username
Main retrospective room with Mad/Sad/Glad board

features.name: Home Page Navigation
features.description: Navigate to create room or join an existing room
user_interactions: Enter 6-digit room code in input field
Enter username in input field
Click join button to join a room
Click create room link to navigate to room creation page
Use Ctrl+N shortcut to create new room

features.name: Create Room
features.description: Create a new retrospective room with name, optional participant limit, and optional time limit
user_interactions: Enter room name (2-50 characters)
Optionally set participant limit (1-50)
Optionally set time limit in minutes (1-300)
Click time limit preset buttons (15/30/45/60 min)
Click create room button
See success modal with room code and invite link
Click copy invite link button
Click go to room button to enter the room

features.name: Join Room
features.description: Join an existing room using a 6-digit code from invite link
user_interactions: Enter username (2-20 characters, alphanumeric + Turkish chars)
Click join button
See error if username is taken or room is full

features.name: Retrospective Board
features.description: Main Mad/Sad/Glad board with entry creation, publishing, and real-time updates
user_interactions: Type entry text in Mad/Sad/Glad textarea (max 500 chars)
Click add button or press Enter to create draft entry
Click publish button to make entry visible to others
Click unpublish button to revert entry to draft
Click edit button to edit draft entry text
Click delete button to remove own entry
See real-time entries from other participants
See character counter below textarea
Use Ctrl+1/2/3 shortcuts to focus Mad/Sad/Glad inputs

features.name: Creator Room Controls
features.description: Room creator can start timer, extend time, reopen, terminate, select entries, and export
user_interactions: Click start timer button to begin countdown
Click extend time button and enter minutes (1-60)
Click reopen room button to remove time limit
Click terminate retro button to end retrospective
Check/uncheck entry checkboxes to select entries for export
Click download Excel button to export selected entries

features.name: Entry Rating
features.description: Rate other users published entries after retro ends (1-5 stars)
user_interactions: Click star icons (1-5) on other users published entries after retro ends
See average rating displayed for own entries (creator view)

features.name: Language Switching
features.description: Switch between Turkish, English, German, and Spanish
user_interactions: Select language from dropdown selector
See all page texts update to selected language

known_limitations.issue: In-memory storage means all data is lost on server restart
known_limitations.impact: Rooms and entries are not persisted across server restarts

known_limitations.issue: No authentication system - users identified only by session
known_limitations.impact: No password protection, anyone with room code can join
